nasb.text: A wild donkey accustomed to the wilderness, That sniffs the wind in her passion. In the time of her heat who can turn her away? All who seek her will not become weary; In her month they will find her.

esv.text: a wild donkey used to the wilderness, in her heat sniffing the wind! Who can restrain her lust? None who seek her need weary themselves; in her month they will find her.

cnv.text: 又像慣在曠野的野驢， 慾心一起就喘氣， 牠春情發動，誰能抑制牠呢？ 尋找牠的都不必費力， 在牠的交配期間，必能找到牠。

ccb.text: 你是一只习惯在旷野生活的母驴， 求偶心切时便呼呼喘气， 发情时谁也控制不了。 公驴找你不费工夫， 在你发情的时候很容易找到你。
